name: Plaquemine Bank & Trust Company
description_short: Community bank serving Louisiana with personal and business banking products, including checking accounts, loans, and ATM access across multiple locations.
description_long:
Plaquemine Bank & Trust Company is a community bank headquartered in Plaquemine, Louisiana, operating as a traditional retail banking institution. The bank is FDIC-insured and designated as an Equal Housing Lender, indicating regulatory compliance and consumer protections standard to federally-insured banks. The institution serves both personal and commercial customers in Louisiana's Iberville Parish and surrounding areas.

The bank offers personal checking accounts, personal loans, business loans, and certified lending products. Customers can access services through their main branch in Plaquemine (24025 Eden Street) and via a mobile app for remote deposit services. The bank maintains multiple ATM locations across the region including sites in Plaquemine, Choctaw Park, Addis, and Port Allen, as well as partnership ATMs at Ochsner Medical and other locations. Debit card services include fraud protection with text, email, and call alerts for suspicious activity.

As a community bank, Plaquemine Bank distinguishes itself through local presence and personalized service rather than national scale. The institution emphasizes security through dedicated fraud monitoring (24/7 hotlines for lost/stolen cards and fraudulent activity reporting), mobile banking capabilities, and remote deposit functionality. Their smaller footprint allows focus on regional lending and personal relationships typical of community banking.

The bank's website provides standard disclosures and security advisories but contains limited detail about interest rates, fees, loan terms, or specific product features. No information is available regarding minimum deposit requirements, account features, loan APRs, or competitive positioning. The website does not detail wealth management, investment services, or commercial banking specialties beyond "certified lending." Customers seeking detailed product comparisons or rate shopping would need to contact the bank directly. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
services: Debit card issuance with fraud protection
pros: FDIC-insured deposits providing federal deposit protection up to $250,000 per account category
Multiple ATM locations across Plaquemine, Iberville Parish, and surrounding areas for convenient cash access
24/7 fraud monitoring and card protection with dedicated after-hours hotlines (1-800-500-1044 and 1-855-961-1602)
Mobile app availability enabling remote deposit services and on-the-go banking
Community bank model emphasizing local lending and personal customer relationships
Both personal and business lending products including certified lending specialization
Equal Housing Lender status confirming non-discrimination in lending practices
cons: Limited geographic footprint restricted primarily to Louisiana's Iberville Parish and immediate surrounding areas
Website lacks critical product details including interest rates, fees, minimum balances, and loan terms
No information about wealth management, investment services, or advanced banking products
Smaller institution may have fewer online banking features or mobile app functionality compared to national banks
Limited transparency regarding business lending terms, SBA loan availability, or commercial credit lines
best_for: Louisiana residents in Plaquemine and Iberville Parish seeking traditional community banking with local service
Small business owners needing relationship-based lending and certified lending products in the region
Customers prioritizing FDIC insurance and fraud protection over digital banking innovation
diagnosis: Plaquemine Bank & Trust Company is best for Louisiana residents and small businesses in the Iberville Parish area seeking FDIC-insured community banking with personal service and fraud protection. The main caveat is the bank's limited geographic reach and lack of transparent product pricing on their website—interested customers must contact the bank directly for rates, fees, and detailed terms.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
